# anthropic_compliance_group_members (Data Source)

Lists members of a specific group. Enterprise + Compliance API key with scope `read:compliance_user_data`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_compliance_group_members" "engineering" {
  group_id = "group_01XYZ..."
}

output "engineering_emails" {
  value = [for m in data.anthropic_compliance_group_members.engineering.members : m.email]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `members` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--members))

<a id="nestedatt--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `members`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String)
- `joined_at` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `source_type` (String)
- `user_id` (String)
